title: Recommendation issued (v1)
description: The output envelope emitted on the `recommendation-issued` port when the chip requests one recommendation effect. The terminal response kind is `finding` (one of the four §8.2 run outcomes); the issued recommendation rides in the `recommendation` field. The effect itself is dispatched by the host under human approval; this records the stable effect key and lineage.

recommendation.description: The issued recommendation marker (e.g. {issued: true, effectKey}).
